page_content:
LBSC706 Seminar in International and Comparative Librarianship and Information Science (3 Credits)

Comparison and contrast of bibliographic systems, institutions, service arrangements, and professional patterns in developed and developing cultures. Libraries, information organizations, and international information systems viewed against the backdrop of national cultures. Influences of social, political, and economic factors upon these forms. Prerequisite: LBSC602; or permission of instructor.
